prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok dialogue. Character_The_Narrator ON CAMERA lip-syncs exactly: "But why will you say that I am mad?". Start speaking immediately with "But" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Other mouths closed. Speech intelligible; never silent. Secondary layer = soft room tone / Foley. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

PREVIOUS CLIP (already provided as video input — continue from its last frame):
INT. BARE ROOM - NIGHT. Candle almost spent. THE NARRATOR sits as at the first-spent, eyes fixed on us. The ghost of the heartbeat fades under his words. He is very still. The Narrator speaks. Character_The_Narrator ON CAMERA lip-syncs "True! Nervous — very, very dreadfully nervous I had been and am.". Character_The_Narrator still wears plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, dark trousers Camera directive: Intimate close-up, 85mm lens, slow push-in on Narrator's spent face and fixed eyes as candle gutters. Performance: Acting intensity 8/10: Wide unblinking stare, furrowed brow, flared nostrils, tight quivering lips Optics: f/1.4 shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh Color grading: Kodak Vision3 500T 5219, deep charcoal shadows, dying warm amber candle highlights
